chat_messages.text: What is the most common name in China?

According to Chinese government data from before my knowledge cutoff, Li (李) is generally considered the most common surname in China, with Wang (王) and Zhang (张) following as the second and third most common surnames respectively. The given name situation is more complex since Chinese given names are highly varied and often unique combinations of characters.

However, since I can't access current demographic data and naming trends can shift over time, I recommend checking recent Chinese census data or official statistics for the most up-to-date information on name frequencies.
